active_profile_source: S00 route/profile plus workspace source inventory

checks: all citable sources have locators or missing entries
citation bank supports downstream related work

downstream_design_force: S04 can bind claims to evidence/citations
S08/S11 can bind figures to source data

failure_severity_policy.BLOCKING: missing critical evidence/citation/template locator for declared target
failure_severity_policy.MAJOR: citation readiness weak for high-quality related work
failure_severity_policy.MINOR: local trace, label, or wording defect that does not alter authority
failure_severity_policy.WATCH: potential reviewer risk tracked without forced full rerun

anti_over_strictness_boundary: MINOR and WATCH findings enter local revision or risk ledger; they do not force full downstream rerun by default.
